title: Split PDF Free | Everything PDF
metaDescription: Split a PDF for free. Separate every page or pull out custom ranges, then download as a ZIP. Your files stay on your device and never get uploaded.
subtitle: Break a PDF apart right on your device — free, no install.
intro: Use this whenever you need just part of a large PDF. Separate every page into individual files, or cut by custom ranges like 1-3 and 4-8. You'll get everything back in a single ZIP.
steps: Upload the PDF you want to split.
For custom ranges, type the sections to split out, like 1-3, 4-8.
Download the split files as a ZIP.
security: Everything is processed 100% inside your browser. Sensitive documents like contracts, official paperwork, and scans are never uploaded anywhere, so you can split with complete peace of mind.

faq.q: How do I save just one specific page on its own?
faq.a: In custom ranges, just type that single page number. Enter '5,' for example, and only page 5 comes out on its own. If you want to pull several pages into one combined file instead, use the 'Extract PDF Pages' tool.

faq.q: What's the difference between separating every page and custom ranges?
faq.a: Separating every page breaks the whole document into individual one-page files. Custom ranges group only the sections you want, like 1-3 and 4-8. Ranges are the handy choice when you want to split a report chapter by chapter.
No. Pages are lifted out exactly as they are, so text and images stay pixel-perfect. Even scans and photo-heavy documents split with no loss of quality.

faq.q: How do I get the results?
faq.a: The split files are bundled into a single ZIP for one easy download. Unzip it and you'll find each PDF inside. There's no limit on the number of files or their size.

faq.q: Do I need to sign up or install anything?
faq.a: Nope. No account, no software — just split your PDF right in the browser. And there are no watermarks.

extraSections.heading: Great for moments like these
extraSections.body: Pulling just your section out of a 100-page group assignment, splitting a contract clause by clause, or organizing scanned application paperwork page by page. It's also handy for breaking a thick report into chapters to archive separately or attach to an email.

extraSections.heading: Tips for custom ranges
extraSections.body: You can enter several ranges at once, separated by commas. Put in 1-3, 4-8 together, for instance, and you'll get two files. Want to cut a PDF in half? Just enter the first range and the second range separately.
